properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The things of this world vainly charm And the joy that it brings never lasts But each time I sing and give praise to my King A joy unspeakable it's bring Lord, you are everything to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are everything to me You’re worth more than I could ever seen Your peace, Your Perfect Love Your power from above Lord you are everything to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord your grace you gave to me abundantly Redemption is price you freely gave on calvary Sin, and death reign no over me This cage eagle has been set free

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are everything to me You’re worth more than I could ever seen Your peace, Your Perfect Love Your power from above Lord you are everything to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So from now I count all this but lord... I dedicate my life I pledge To serve you more! With my eye fix on the cross your holy name I will adore

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are everything to me You’re worth more than I could ever seen Your peace, Your Perfect Love Your power from above Lord you are everything to me
